method: Rendered the rebuilt 23-page PDF with pdftoppm at 120 DPI after adding explicit abstract Wilson intervals for the refusal and Qwen medical-organism rate claims. Verified pdfinfo reports 23 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus page 1 at full size; the longer abstract fits before the Introduction and all visible text, citations, figures, tables, and labels are legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, or alignment defects observed.
